what: Neural pipeline on the ORIG (diplomatic) surface layer of the PapyGreek fold: same 1,696 sentences and gold as papygreek-fold-v2, FORM = raw scribal orthography (1,637 forms differ).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(layer='orig'); CPU sequential; fold papygreek-fold-orig-v1 (sha 5af59219...); orig-form leakage recheck 0
finding: the cost of diplomatic orthography, isolated (same sentences, same gold as the reg row): lemma -4.33 points, UFeats -2.67, XPOS -2.66, UPOS -1.05, UAS -1.38, LAS -2.25; only 6.8% of tokens differ in surface form, so the per-changed-token degradation is steep and concentrates on lemma composition
